description: Style NoteThese floaters from gliders for men are an example of the brand's excellent craftsmanship. The synthetic upper and aggressive outsole showcase the brand's versatile power in innovating. These sandals are perfect for braving the Indian monsoon and for general rough use. The busy print on the upper is sure to life your spirits during the monsoon. Wear these with your off-duty essentials.Product DetailsBlunt toed floaters in black with a slight heel, forefoot and ankle loop straps with Velcro closuresFoamy rubber footbedCurved rubber footbed with patterned groovesMaterial and CareSynthetic, fabricDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
